hyperedges.label: Cold-launch intro → auth → cascade → dashboard handoff
Cross-device real-time habit sync (SSE + outbox + reconcile)
Habit verification: canonical match → AutoVerify → tier-weighted scoring

hyperedges.name: screen_time_verification_pipeline
hyperedges.description: Family Controls flow: AddHabitBar surfaces SocialAppsPickerSheet, which writes to ScreenTimeService; the extension writes per-day overLimit flags into the App Group; VerificationService reads them via wasOverLimit(on:) to award .auto vs .selfReport.

hyperedges.name: mentor_chat_character_rendering
hyperedges.description: Bruce mentor character composition: WalkerState drives position, LoopingVideoView renders the .mov, MentorChatBubble shows the conversation tied to HabitBackendStore.dashboard.match, SpeechBubbleNudge shows transient prompts above the head.

hyperedges.name: today_dashboard_data_flow
hyperedges.description: Habit + HabitCompletion are the SwiftData truth that SyncEngine reconciles server-wins; HabitMetrics.compute consumes Habit to produce dashboard stats consumed by PhoneTabScaffold and StatsSidebar.

hyperedges.name: Widget snapshot pipeline
hyperedges.description: Main app writes WidgetSnapshot JSON to App Group; widget extension's TimelineProvider reads it; widgets render and write toggle entries back via WidgetToggleOutbox, which the writer drains.

hyperedges.name: ScreenTime verification cross-process flow
hyperedges.description: DeviceActivityMonitor extension writes per-day overLimit flags into the App Group UserDefaults; ScreenTimeService reads them; VerificationService.verifyScreenTimeSocial consults the result to grant or fall back.

hyperedges.name: Shared widget design system
hyperedges.description: All widgets share the WidgetPalette/ProgressRing/WidgetBackground primitives for consistent visual language across small/medium/large/extra-large families.
